title: StatsPlugin
description: Simple GUI stats plugin for Paper/Spigot
body:
# StatsPlugin

A lightweight stats GUI plugin for Paper/Spigot servers.

## Features

* `/stats` open stats GUI
* `/stats <player>` view another player's stats
* Works with offline players
* Economy support via Vault
* Clean GUI interface
* Item movement prevention

## Stats Included

* Money
* Kills
* Deaths
* Playtime
* Blocks Placed
* Blocks Broken
* Mobs Killed
* Money Spent on Shop
* Money Made on `/sell`

## Commands

```
/stats
/stats <player>
```

## Requirements

* Paper / Spigot 1.21+
* Vault
* Economy plugin (EssentialsX recommended)

## Installation

1. Download the plugin jar
2. Place it into the `plugins` folder
3. Restart the server

## License
